name: ProPanel 3x2
comment:
ProPanel 3x2, Firmware Rev A5: Profoto ProPanel 3x4 GDTF file for firmware A5 or later.
For latest firmware, DMX specification and GDTF files, see: http://www.profoto.com

capabilities.comment: P13 - 16 Bit CCT to X/Y coordinates

modes.name: P13 - 16 Bit CCT to X/Y coordinates
P24 - 8 Bit Pixel mapping CCT to RGBW
P25 - 16 Bit Pixel mapping CCT to RGBW
